front.title: Deterministic Networking SRv6 Data Plane for Service Protection

abstract.t: This document specifies the Deterministic Networking (DetNet) data plane aspects for service protection when operating over an IPv6/SRv6 Packet Switched Network. It leverages existing IPv6 encapsulations and behaviors. It uses the Redundancy SIDs in DetNet scenarios and optionally the Traffic Engineering mechanisms provided by SRv6. This document builds on the DetNet architecture and data plane framework.
